rulings.Case Title: MIXPANEL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. 405 HOWARD STREET SF LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF MIXPANEL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order - To Knotel, Inc is continued to December 17, 2020. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than 8:00 a.m. on December 16, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TOWER VALET PARKING, INC. VS. K9 PLAYTIME, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT K9 PLAYTIME, INC., PAUL CROWELL DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. CCP 430.10(c) is not applicable. Request for Judicial Notice is granted. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CINDY TRENT VS. SEAN C MCKEAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2020 line 4. PLAINTIFF CINDY TRENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions is DENIED. Based on the method of service of the Order notifying the Defendant of their obligation to respond, responses were due by the end of day on December 9, 2020. This motion was filed at 11:21 a.m. on December 9, 2020. Requests for sanctions are denied. =(501/CFH)
